novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2 | Conjecture 4
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship objects C, Omega, and P_BJS are promised, but Section 9 does not derive the SA/CS/W/BJS loading matrices from estimator primitives; C is displayed by assertion, Omega is set to I, and P_BJS uses only Z_BJS rather than the four-design stack.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist misses closer efficiency / EIF comparators: Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie 2025 derive closed-form efficient influence functions for DiD/event-study parameters, and Roth-Sant'Anna 2023 study efficient estimation for staggered rollout designs.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Theorem 3 | Conjecture 4
novelty_flags.one_line: Several flagship comparator claims cite Sun-Abraham, Callaway-Sant'Anna, Goodman-Bacon, de Chaisemartin-D'Haultfoeuille, and Roth 2026 only by bibkey, without a section/equation/page anchor for the exact gap being claimed.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The Consumer clause says only 'empirical staggered-DiD robustness tables comparing BJS, SA, CS, and ETWFE', which is a generic workflow rather than a named paper, domain, or open question.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 6 defines C_m as a difference of U-loading matrices L_m - L_BJS, but Sections 8-9 multiply C_m by tau; the tau-dimension and U-dimension objects are conflated, and Omega_m = C_m Sigma C_m^T is incompatible with the displayed 3x6 witness C.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed P_BJS is the projection onto col(Z_BJS), while the statement calls it the unique projection of the stacked space col(Z_BJS)+col(Z_SA)+col(Z_CS)+col(Z_W); the equality needs an extra condition or a different map.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The witness proof only says to assign the same target and change residual loadings; it does not derive SA, CS, Wooldridge, and BJS loadings from their normal equations, so the theorem is currently an arbitrary matrix example.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Once C is defined as the stacked IF-loading contrast, the iff frontier is close to a row-stacking identity unless the proposal gives an independent primitive construction and non-routine derivation of C.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the asserted C with explicit Z_BJS, Z_SA, Z_CS, and Z_W matrices and derive each L_m from the four estimator normal equations before forming C.
Repair the dimensions by distinguishing the U-loading maps from the tau-to-loading contrast maps, then recompute Omega from conformable primitives in the T=4 exhibit.

Add location-level anchors for the load-bearing comparator claims, especially BJS Section 2.3, Sun-Abraham's contamination result, Callaway-Sant'Anna group-time ATT aggregation, Wooldridge's equivalence proposition, and Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie's EIF result.
Make Theorem 3 a genuine estimator witness by listing the four estimator loading matrices and verifying that each comes from the named estimator rather than from an arbitrary existence clause.

recommended_next_step: Revise locally: define conformable primitive loading maps and compute the four-estimator T=4 exhibit from those maps; without that, the kernel remains below the flagship floor.
